title: Pan-Seared Fish with Lemon and Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful dish that showcases the tender fish with a zesty lemon and herb sauce.

ingredients.name: Tender Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish such as cod or snapper

instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the fish and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Stir in the lemon juice and parsley.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
